description: Bundle (1) source-tree flatten src/py/{app,tests} → src/{app,tests} + delete src/js wholesale, with (2) frontend rebuild as HTMX + Tailwind v4 + Alpine.js + ApexCharts via litestar-vite mode='template' + built-in litestar.plugins.htmx (no separate PyPI dep). End state: src/{app,resources,templates,tests}/, vite.config.ts + package.json at repo root, executor=node (no bun, no biome, no TanStack). Two pages: chat (feature parity with deleted React) + explore (5 panels — vector-search, EXPLAIN PLAN viewer, metrics summary cards via hx-ext='litestar' ls-* templating, latency time-series via Alpine+ApexCharts, classify-compare from Ch 3 CLI output). Single dev command: VITE_DEV_MODE=true uv run coffee run.
